title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud's Database Migration Service uses Gemini to assist developers in converting Oracle database schemas and code to PostgreSQL. The tutorial demonstrates converting data types like VARCHAR2, NUMBER, and DATE while maintaining precision and internationalization support.
